content_body:
Here in Blue Ridge, GA the days are long and lazy as summertime is here! Planning a trip to Blue Ridge and finding the perfect Blue Ridge cabin rental for you just got easier with Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Blue Ridge is that special spot in the world to explore and to be energized, and Cabin Rentals of Georgia would like to help make your North Georgia mountain excursion delightfully effortless. Let us help you find the perfect mountain Blue Ridge cabin close to all the activities you are excited to experience and explore. All the members of our staff are long-time residents of Blue Ridge and the surrounding area, and they know all the cool things to do and the best local hangouts. 

A Blue Ridge Cabin Rental That Fits Your Style

Whether you want a cozy Blue Ridge cabin rental for two, a cabin to accommodate your family, or a luxury lodge for a couples' retreat, we at Cabin Rentals of Georgia have just the perfect size and style for you! Ranging from rustic elegance to sophisticated luxury, we have just what you are looking for. We are a small boutique Blue Ridge cabin rental company and all of our luxury cabins are hand-picked for their special uniqueness, design, and locale. Water views from afar or on a creek, river, or lake are sure to delight everyone, especially in the summertime.  Several Blue Ridge cabins such as Crooked Creek Cabin or Royal Mountain Lodge will fit that bill to energize and mesmerize! Our panoramic mountain view cabins at Cohutta Sunset will take your breath away and you will feel a million miles away from the stress of everyday life. Nature has a way of making the cares of this world seem minuscule and insignificant as you explore something larger than yourself. Thankfully, Blue Ridge offers the right prescription and perspective for getting out of your head and into an experience!

Explore and Experience Blue Ridge

Whether you want to revel in the peacefulness of your Blue Ridge cabin rental or be close to all the action and experience everything, several cabins will fit that bill perfectly. Riverview Lodge, Fallen Timber Lodge, and The River's Edge are 30 minutes away from world-class whitewater rafting on Class II-IV rapids and less than 15 minutes from Historic Downtown Blue Ridge. These particular cabins are located on or near the Toccoa River so tubing and kayaking are a breeze. If you put in at your cabin and float upriver for about 2 hours, you will pass by Horseshoe Bend Park, the perfect take out spot. You can continue for another mile upriver into McCaysville and take out there. Just be sure to have a car waiting for you to take you back to your cabin. 

Blue Ridge Cabin Bells And Whistles

Each Blue Ridge cabin rental is beautifully appointed with luxurious furniture and decor. Depending on the cabin, locale, setting, and amenities, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers first class amenities that please even the most discerning guest. In our portfolio of luxury homes, you can find some of the following amenities:

  • Outdoor Grill
  • Al fresco Dining, Porch Swings, Rockers
  • Hot tub
  • Washer and Dryer laundry supplies
  • TV and DVD Player
  • Billiards, Foosball, Pinball Machines, Retro Arcade Gaming Table, Board Games, DVD Library, Book Library
  • Outdoor Fireplace
  • Private Boat Dock
  • Riverside Gazebo, Picnic Tables, Fire pits, Horseshoes

Book Now and Experience Blue Ridge!

Once you have narrowed down your choices for the most ideal Blue Ridge cabin rental for your party, you have the opportunity to book online or better yet ~ talk to one our friendly reservation specialists, who are local experts and can help you make that final decision if you're just not sure which cabin to book. We can help you plan your activities and point you to our favorite haunts. 

The Blue Ridge mountains are calling....and you must come!
title: Finding the Perfect Blue Ridge Cabin Rental
